measure_definitions.frequency: Number of CMT mapping records in the reviewed mapping table.
measure_definitions.distribution: Number of documents, registers, or periods in which a mapping pattern appears.
measure_definitions.concentration: Whether mappings are concentrated in a few documents or periods.
measure_definitions.rhetorical_salience: Analyst-coded prominence in the local rhetorical occasion.
measure_definitions.conceptual_centrality: Whether a cluster organizes multiple mapping records in the current evidence set.
measure_definitions.ideological_force: Recorded ideological functions attached to the mapping; not reducible to frequency.
